stmt: ∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x : α, x * x = x
∃ (α : Type) (_ : SemigroupLike01 α), ∃ x y z : α, (x * y) * z ≠ x * (y * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * x = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * y = x * y
∃ (α : Type) (_ : SemigroupLike01 α), ¬ ∃ e : α, ∀ x : α, e * x = x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, x * (x * y) = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * y = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e ∧ e * x = e) → (∀ x : α, x * f = f ∧ f * x = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * x = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z t : α, (((x * y) * z) * t) = (((x * y) * t) * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * (x * y)) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [Mul α], ∀ e f : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e) → (∀ x : α, f * x = f) → e = f
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ e : α, (∀ x : α, x * e = e) → ∀ x : α, e * x = e
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * (x * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * x) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (((x * y) * z) * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * ((x * y) * z) = (x * y) * z
For every type with the same axioms and all elements x, y, z, one has ((x * y) * z) * (x * y) = (x * y) * z.
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * (x * y) = (x * y) * z
∃ (α : Type) (_ : AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α) (e x : α), (∀ y : α, e * y = e) ∧ x * e ≠ e
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α] (a b c : α), ((a * b) * c) * a = (a * b) * c
∀ {α : Type u} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ a b c t : α, t = a * b → ((a * b) * c) * t = (a * b) * c
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α] (a b c d : α), (((a * b) * c) * d) * a = ((a * b) * c) * d
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, ((x * y) * z) * (x * y) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type _} [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ a b c d : α, (((a * b) * c) * d) * (a * b) = ((a * b) * c) * d
Show formally that the left-projection operation `x * y := x` defines an instance of `AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01` on any type.
∀ {α : Type _} [Fintype α] [AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α] (e : α), (∀ y : α, e * y = e) → (¬ ∀ x : α, x * e = e) → Nontrivial α
∀ (α : Type _) [Nontrivial α], ∃ (_ : AutomatedTheoryConstruction.SemigroupLike01 α), ∃ e : α, (∀ y : α, e * y = e) ∧ ¬ ∀ x : α, x * e = e
